transcript: The military was protecting against the seizure of private property and communist takeover. They were protecting corporate profits. And Che saw that they would use the fear of communism to overthrow any government that threatened those profits. So he took the lessons of Guatemala with him to Mexico. There he met exiled Cuban revolutionaries and decided to help them liberate their country. You mean help Fidel Castro turn a vibrant Cuba into a dictatorship. Dictatorship was what Cuba had.
